status_legend.in_progress: The feature is the current active task.
status_legend.blocked: Work cannot continue until a documented blocker is resolved.
status_legend.passing: Required verification has passed and evidence is recorded.

features.name: UI generation via chat
features.description: User types a prompt, AI generates a React component via streaming tool calls, and the preview iframe renders the result using Babel Standalone.
verification: Open the app, send a generation prompt, verify the preview iframe renders the component.
evidence: Initial commit — core generation pipeline working end-to-end (58b87de)

features.name: User authentication
features.description: Users can sign up and sign in via JWT stored in an httpOnly cookie. Passwords are hashed with bcrypt.
verification: npm test (includes auth.ts and use-auth hook tests)
Sign up with a new email; sign in with existing credentials.
evidence: Add use-auth hook tests, fix 14 npm vulnerabilities (bda8d9f)

features.name: Virtual file system
features.description: In-memory VirtualFileSystem supports create, edit, rename, delete, and serialization for request transport and DB storage.

features.name: Chat context streaming
features.description: ChatContext intercepts AI tool calls via onToolCall and dispatches mutations to FileSystemContext, keeping client and server in sync.
evidence: Expand chat-context tests with missing coverage (8cf21b2)

features.name: Project persistence
features.description: Authenticated users' generated projects are saved to SQLite and reloaded from /[projectId] on page load.
verification: Sign in, generate a component, reload the page.
Navigate to /[projectId] URL and verify the project restores.

features.name: Anonymous user flow
features.description: Anonymous users can generate components; work is preserved in sessionStorage and promoted to a saved project on sign-up.
verification: Generate a component without signing in.
Sign up — verify work is preserved and a project is created.
evidence: Initial commit — anon flow via anon-work-tracker.ts (58b87de)

features.name: Code export / download
features.description: User can download the generated virtual file system as a ZIP archive or copy individual file contents to the clipboard.
verification: Verify a ZIP is downloaded or file content is copied correctly.
features.notes: Next logical UX improvement after core flows are all passing.
